metadata.contentRights: Storm Blocks uses original/generated project assets and no third-party copyrighted IP.
metadata.monetization: No forced ads, no paid power, no paid speedups, no gacha, and no loot boxes.

achievements.title: First Pushback
achievements.preEarnedDescription: Clear through storm tiles to push the storm back.
achievements.earnedDescription: You pushed the storm back with a clear.

achievements.title: Clutch Save
achievements.preEarnedDescription: Push the storm back while camp is nearly surrounded.
achievements.earnedDescription: You saved camp at the last moment.

achievements.title: Storm Watch
achievements.preEarnedDescription: Complete Daily Storm three days in a row.
achievements.earnedDescription: You completed three Daily Storms in a row.

achievements.title: Storm Keeper
achievements.preEarnedDescription: Complete Daily Storm seven days in a row.
achievements.earnedDescription: You completed seven Daily Storms in a row.

achievements.title: Trail Guide
achievements.preEarnedDescription: Complete a full Storm Trail region.
achievements.earnedDescription: You completed a Storm Trail region.

achievements.title: Trial Runner
achievements.preEarnedDescription: Complete a weekly Tempest Trial run.
achievements.earnedDescription: You completed a Tempest Trial run.

achievements.title: Camp Stylist
achievements.preEarnedDescription: Unlock a collection of cosmetic-only rewards.
achievements.earnedDescription: You unlocked a collection of cosmetics.
